response.justification: Strong geospatial and distributed systems expertise with staff-level seniority, but insufficient modern C++ experience (last work in 2014-2015; recent 4+ years in TypeScript). Candidate demonstrates language versatility and could potentially develop C++ proficiency, but would require significant ramp-up on the core technical requirement.
strengths: Extensive geospatial expertise from GISCollective and Green Map projects, including real-world mapping platforms
Demonstrated distributed systems experience at scale (Dunnhumby: millions of requests per second microservices architecture)
Staff-level seniority with proven track record in software craftsmanship, TDD, and code quality practices
concerns: C++ experience limited to 6 months at National Instruments (2014-2015); over a decade without professional modern C++
No Rust experience despite it being an acceptable alternative to C++ for this role
Recent 4+ years primarily in TypeScript/Node.js web development, not systems programming languages
